caption:
Men's aesthetics at Rani. Because self-care has no gender.

More men are walking through our doors than ever—and here's what they're asking for:

• Botox for forehead lines and crow's feet ("I don't want to look angry on Zoom calls")
• Laser hair removal for back, chest, and neck
• HydraFacials for clearer, healthier skin
• GLP-1 weight management programs
• Testosterone optimization through HRT
• Peptide therapy for recovery, energy, and performance

The conversation around men's aesthetics and wellness has shifted. It's no longer about vanity. It's about optimization. Looking sharp. Feeling strong. Performing at your best.

Our male patients range from executives who want to look as vital as they feel, to athletes optimizing recovery, to guys who simply want better skin.

No judgment. No gendered marketing gimmicks. Just results.

Book your consultation. We treat everyone at Rani.
mediaDescription: Clean, masculine-energy content. Photo or Reel showing a male patient's hands during consultation (no face), treatment room setup, or close-up of treatment. Neutral color palette—charcoal, white, gold. Typography is bold and direct. Rani branding.
